name: @forgeax/engine-rhi-wgpu
description: TS-only thin shell implementation of @forgeax/engine-rhi — depends on @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm for the merged wgpu 29 + naga 29 wasm bindings; spec-aligned wasm-bindgen surface, math-free.

bundle-size.reason: TS-only thin shell; wasm physical bundle size is measured at @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm workspace (single bundle-size SSOT per AC-07 + D-P9)

fps.reason: thin shell, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps that drive this shim

bench.reason: shim has no hot path bench; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

gate.reason: smoke gate is anchored at apps/hello/triangle smoke (rhi-webgpu) and apps/hello/cube + browser test renderer-wgpu-wasm.browser.test.ts; shim itself has no standalone binary gate

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; rhi-wgpu is the productionised TS thin shell over @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm (feat-20260511-naga-rhi-wgpu-merge)
